decisions.decision: Skip Phase 3, autonomous starts at Phase 4 (--from 4 semantics)

decisions.decision: All 4 grey areas accepted as recommended
decisions.rationale: GLB authoring CC0+customise / postprocessing drei defaults / Web3Forms shared form / split CHECKLIST-OPSEC + new CHECKLIST-LAUNCH. Captured as D-01..D-17 in 04-CONTEXT.md

decisions.decision: RESEARCH technical corrections override CONTEXT verbatim
decisions.rationale: Bloom luminanceThreshold not threshold; PerformanceMonitor bounds is function; CSP needs api.web3forms.com; ChromaticAberration offset is tuple; multisampling=0 explicit. Documented in plans 04-01, 04-02
Both modify src/sections/Contact.tsx in Wave 1; sequencing required to avoid concurrent overwrite (plan-checker Blocker 3)

decisions.decision: WebP textures, NOT KTX2 (overrides CONTEXT D-02)
decisions.rationale: gltfjsx --transform defaults to WebP; KTX2 unreachable without hand-rolling @gltf-transform/cli (CLAUDE.md forbids)

decisions.decision: Plan 04-08 stays autonomous: false; verification stays human_needed until rows filled
decisions.rationale: OPS-04 real-device, peer reviews, OG screenshot, Web3Forms delivery test fundamentally cannot be done by an agent

next_action: On resume, FIRST check whether the two background agents (04-01 + 04-02) committed their work. Run `git log --oneline -20` and look for `feat(04-01)` and `feat(04-02)` commits + `04-01-SUMMARY.md` / `04-02-SUMMARY.md` files. If present → mark Wave 1 partial done, ask Eren the host-pick + TryHackMe/HackTheBox handles questions before launching 04-03 + 04-04. If absent → consider re-launching Wave 1 plans inline. Do NOT touch Plan 03-06.
context_notes: Mid-Wave-1 of Phase 4 autonomous run. /gsd-autonomous --from 4 was invoked because Plan 03-06 (MDX write-ups) is permanently deferred per the saved 'no fabricated lab evidence' rule. Phase 4 is the v1.0 ship phase. UI-SPEC + RESEARCH + PLAN + PATTERNS all done and committed; plan-checker found 3 BLOCKERs which were fixed inline. Wave 1 launched with 04-01 (postprocessing) + 04-02 (ContactForm) in parallel worktrees. 04-03 (LiveProfiles) was held back because it depends_on 04-02. 04-04 was held back because Task 1 is a checkpoint:decision (host pick) that needs Eren input — better to surface alongside other decisions than launch and pause. The remaining waves (2/3/4) all have at least one human checkpoint and 04-08 is entirely human-needed. Eren has 8 external prerequisites to gather before 04-08 can complete. The autonomous workflow's natural conclusion involves a long pause for real-world setup (Web3Forms account, two physical devices, named peer reviewers, OG screenshot of deployed site).
